backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the AD TRIBE backend with types for advertising registrations and user profiles, plus query/update functions for profile management, professional registration submission, and verified member retrieval, all gated by access control checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (hero background image, green/saffron retheme) to their affected files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for every frontend source file, describing the purpose and recent changes of each component, page, hook, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark mode themes (background, foreground, primary, accent, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'AD TRIBE', loading Bebas Neue and Inter fonts from Google Fonts and mounting the Vite/React entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for landing, profile, dashboard, connections, registration, and registration-success pages, and conditionally renders the ProfileSetup modal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Availab: Interactive monthly calendar component that lets users toggle individual dates as available, operating on a plain array of Date objects with optional read-only mode.
Simple presentational component rendering color-coded legend items for Available, Booked, and Unavailable calendar states.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main application layout component providing a sticky header with navigation, login/logout via Internet Identity, and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Locatio: Placeholder card component for location profiles that redirects users to the registration flow.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Product: Placeholder card component for production house profiles that redirects users to the registration flow.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Profess: Displays a read-only view of a user's submitted professional advertising registration, including name, city, department, designation, and experience, with a fallback to prompt registration.
frontend/src/components/profiles/VendorP: Placeholder card component for equipment vendor profiles that redirects users to the registration flow.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and creates their profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation, styled with saffron accent colors.
frontend/src/components/registration/Inl: Multi-step professional registration form with department/designation selects, an availability date picker calendar, and submission via a React Query mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/search/ProviderC: Card component that displays a provider's name, type, description, and up to four tags with an overflow count badge.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: Controlled text input component with a search icon for querying providers by name or keyword.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchFil: Filter UI component with a dropdown to select provider type (all, professional, vendor, location).
frontend/src/components/search/SearchRes: Search results display component that shows skeleton loaders while loading and an empty-state message when no results are found.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, professional registrations, and verified members.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the AD TRIBE light and dark color themes using OKLCH values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ConnectionsPage.tsx: Displays a list of verified AD TRIBE community members fetched from the backend, showing their principal IDs with a verified badge.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing navigation cards for the user's profile and the tribe connections, with a personalized welcome message.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with a hero section, feature cards, and stats; handles unauthenticated login flow and inline registration form display.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's account info and professional registration details, with label mappings for expertise areas and designations.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationPage.tsx: Standalone registration page that renders the InlineRegistrationForm and redirects to a success route on completion.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationSuccessPa: Displays a post-registration success screen confirming the user has joined AD TRIBE, with buttons to navigate to the dashboard or profile page.
frontend/src/utils/dateHelpers.ts: Provides utility functions for converting between Date objects and nanosecond-precision Time (BigInt), comparing dates, formatting dates, and generating date ranges.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear parameters via sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the AD TRIBE design system including brand colors (saffron, forest, gold), display/body fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the AD TRIBE platform's architecture, existing features, known issues, and versioning metadata for a professional networking app targeting the advertising industry.
